Bouncy Castle & Inflatable Rentals Bridgewater NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals brings commercial-grade bouncy castle rentals, inflatable rentals, water slides, interactive games, and 360 Photo Booth to backyard birthdays, school events, festivals, community events, and summer celebrations across the South Shore and Nova Scotia. We are based in Bridgewater — setup and takedown included with every rental, and fully insured.

Service Area

Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

Our Lineup

  • 360 Photo Booth - Photo Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Photo Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.
  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, $310, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.
  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Quest - Obstacle Course, $289, Dry-use - Obstacle course attraction for bigger event energy.
  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.
  • Crown Climber - Small Climbing Inflatable, $280, Dry-use - A fun small climbing inflatable best suited for younger kids who want a quick climb-and-slide style activity.
  • Crown Carnival Challenge - Interactive Game, $270, Dry-use - Carnival-style inflatable challenge game for all ages.
  • Crown Dino Combo - Combo Inflatable, $279, Dry-use - Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide fun.
  • Kids Foam Party - Foam Party, From $200/hr add-on · From $349/hr standalone, Wet-use - High-energy foam fun for kids' birthdays, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations.

  • Royal All-Star - $849 (save $61): Crown Rush 42, Crown Axe Challenge, Crown Kick Darts, 5 Lawn Games
  • Kingdom Deluxe - $1,099 (save $121): Crown Rush 42, Crown Island Combo, Crown Axe Challenge, Crown Kick Darts, 5 Lawn Games
  • Ultimate Kingdom - $1,599 (save $180): Crown Rush 42, Crown Climber, Crown Island Combo, Crown Dino Combo, Crown Axe Challenge, Crown Kick Darts, 5 Lawn Games

Safety & Booking Notes

  • Booking is not instantly confirmed: Online form submissions are availability requests only. Your booking is confirmed only after Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit/payment details.
  • 19+ adult supervision required: A responsible adult aged 19+ must actively supervise participants at all times.
  • Delivery and setup included: Delivery, setup, and takedown are handled by Nova Kingdom Rentals unless otherwise agreed.
  • Travel fee: First 15 km from Bridgewater is free. After that, travel is $0.72/km.
  • Weather safety: Inflatables cannot be used during rain, thunderstorms, lightning, unsafe weather, or high winds.
  • Wind limit: Use must stop if wind exceeds the manufacturer limit, or 38 km/h if no specific limit is stated.
  • Setup area required: Setup area must be safe, level, accessible, properly sized, and clear of underground and overhead hazards.
  • No Silly String: Silly String is strictly prohibited because it can permanently damage inflatable vinyl. Damage charges may apply.
  • Wet-use units: For water slides or wet-use units, customer must provide water source and hose access. Water must be turned off at least 1 hour before pickup to allow draining.
  • Power required: Most inflatables require suitable power access. Blower must stay powered and running during use.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are bookings instantly confirmed online?
No. Online form submissions are availability requests only. Your booking is confirmed only after Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit/payment details.
What is the wind limit?
Use must stop if wind exceeds the manufacturer limit. If no specific unit limit is stated, use must stop at 38 km/h or earlier if conditions feel unsafe.
Is Silly String allowed?
No. Silly String is strictly prohibited because it can permanently damage inflatable vinyl. Damage charges may apply.
How far do you deliver?
The first 15 km from Bridgewater is free. After that, travel is $0.72/km.

Check availability and request a quote
